initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST((strftime('%Y', '2023-12-31') - strftime('%Y', l.birthday)) AS INTEGER) - 
    CAST((strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) - strftime('%Y', l.birthday)) AS INTEGER) AS years_elapsed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
WHERE l.gender = 'M' 
  AND lt.state = 'LA'
  AND lt.term_end >= '2023-12-31'
  AND CAST((strftime('%Y', '2023-12-31') - strftime('%Y', l.birthday)) AS INTEGER) - 
      CAST((strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) - strftime('%Y', l.birthday)) AS INTEGER) > 30
  AND CAST((strftime('%Y', '2023-12-31') - strftime('%Y', l.birthday)) AS INTEGER) - 
      CAST((strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) - strftime('%Y', l.birthday)) AS INTEGER) < 50
GROUP BY years_elapsed
ORDER BY years_elapsed;

SELECT 
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) AS years_elapsed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
WHERE l.gender = 'M'
  AND lt.state = 'LA'
  AND lt.term_end >= date('now', '-1 year', 'start of year')  -- ensure they were serving at least part of last year
  AND CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) > 30
  AND CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) < 50
GROUP BY years_elapsed
ORDER BY years_elapsed;

SELECT 
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) AS years_elapsed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
WHERE l.gender = 'M' 
  AND lt.state = 'LA'
  AND lt.term_end >= date('now', '-1 year')  -- ensure they were serving recently
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) > 30
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) < 50
GROUP BY years_elapsed
ORDER BY years_elapsed;

SELECT 
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) AS years_elapsed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
WHERE l.gender = 'M'
  AND lt.state = 'LA'
  AND lt.term_end >= date('now', '-1 year')  -- actively serving as of end of last year
  AND (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER)) > 30
  AND (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER)) < 50
GROUP BY years_elapsed
ORDER BY years_elapsed;

SELECT 
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) AS years_elapsed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
WHERE l.gender = 'M'
  AND lt.state = 'LA'
  AND lt.term_end >= date('now', '-1 year', 'start of year')  -- ensure they were serving at least part of last year
  AND CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) > 30
  AND CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) < 50
GROUP BY years_elapsed
ORDER BY years_elapsed;
